name: Validate the  presence of menu items under “My Info”

steps.name: Given I open the login page
And I login with valid username and valid password
When I click on My info
Then menu items under My info should be visible and clickable
Take screenshot and attach it to the report

attachments.name: Menu items under My info is visible and clickable

parameters.name: step_name
parameters.value: 'Menu items under My info is visible and clickable'

fullName: My info validation: Validate the  presence of menu items under “My Info”
